label: Cohere
description: Connect to Cohere's Command models, embeddings, and reranking APIs using your Cohere API key.

form.title: Connect Cohere
form.subtitle: Paste your Cohere API key to enable Command model generation, embeddings, and reranking.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste an API key from your Cohere dashboard. Takes 30 seconds — no OAuth flow, no extra setup required.
methods.how_to:
## Get a Cohere API Key

1. Open [dashboard.cohere.com](https://dashboard.cohere.com) and sign in (or create a free account).
2. In the left sidebar, click **API Keys**.
3. Click **+ New API Key**, give it a name like `Anton`, and click **Generate**.
4. Copy the key shown — it will not be displayed again in full after you leave the page.
5. Paste the key into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

## Notes

- Trial keys work immediately but have rate limits. Upgrade to a production key for higher throughput.
- To scope access, Cohere lets you create multiple keys — consider a dedicated key per application.
- You can revoke a key at any time from the **API Keys** page without affecting other keys.
- If you're using a private deployment or an Azure/AWS marketplace endpoint, also fill in the optional **Base URL** field.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Found at dashboard.cohere.com → API Keys. Keep this secret — anyone with it can bill your account.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL (optional)
fields.description: Override the default API endpoint — useful for Azure AI, AWS Bedrock, or private deployments. Leave blank to use Cohere's hosted API.

fields.name: default_model
fields.label: Default Model
fields.description: The Command model Anton will use for generation tasks unless overridden per-request.
